feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2081 201 1880 98
PT 1791 144 1647 24

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Mini Landlord - Watch Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Full Game Unlock：0,99 €
  • Luxury Pack：1,99 €
  • Medium Pack：0,99 €

Application Description

From the creators of "Mini Billiards," comes a classic Doudizhu (Landlord Poker) game exclusively designed for Apple Watch! Experience smart AI opponents, 3 difficulty levels, and immersive haptic feedback. No internet needed. No iPhone needed. Just lift your wrist and play anytime, anywhere! Game Features: • Premium Offline Experience: One-time purchase, no ads, no data usage. Play on the subway, on a plane, or anywhere without signal. • 3 Difficulty Levels: Easy Mode: Newbie friendly with great starting hands. Pure stress relief. Medium Mode: Classic strategy. Win with your skills. Hard Mode: High Rollers! High stakes, high rewards. Heart-pounding action! • Emergency Aid System: Ran out of beans? Don't worry! The system provides free "Emergency Aid" beans to help you make a comeback. The fun never stops! • Customizable Skins: Use your winnings to unlock premium table themes. • Immersive Haptics: Large button layout optimized for the watch face, combined with Taptic Engine feedback for a satisfying gaming feel. • Watch Face Complication: Add to your watch face for one-tap instant access. No waiting. ‌How to Play:‌ • Tap Cards: Tap to select cards (cards will float up); tap again to deselect. • Play Cards: Tap the play button. The smart system auto-detects card patterns and prevents invalid moves. • Bid for Landlord: Choose to bid 1-3 points based on your hand strength. • Long Press to Quit: Perfect for a quick break! Long press the screen for 1 second to instantly exit the game and return to the watch face. • Winning: The Landlord wins by playing all cards first. Farmers win if either teammate plays all cards first.

entry.title: Flying Carpet File Transfer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Direct file transfer between iOS, Android, Linux, and Windows with no wireless network or internet connection required: just two devices in close range using ad hoc WiFi (and optionally Bluetooth). Other versions available for free at https://flyingcarpet.spiegl.dev.

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Blasphemous
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 5,59 € [5,59 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,59 €

Application Description

Lute. Resista. Rompa a condenação eterna. Blasphemous é um premiado jogo de ação e plataforma 2D com elementos soulslike. Oferece combates brutais no estilo Hack and Slash e uma exploração profunda em um mundo sombrio e gótico, marcado por penitência e sofrimento. Na terra amaldiçoada de Cvstodia, devastada pela distorcida maldição conhecida como O Milagre, você controla o Penitente, o último sobrevivente da Irmandade do Lamento Mudo, preso em um ciclo sem fim de morte e renascimento. Enfrente inimigos monstruosos, evite armadilhas mortais e descubra segredos ocultos em fases em pixel art feitas à mão. Em busca de redenção, explore catedrais desoladas, ermos esquecidos e masmorras ensanguentadas, enfrentando monstros grotescos, chefes implacáveis e almas atormentadas. A penitência nunca termina. PRINCIPAIS CARACTERÍSTICAS - Explore um mundo não linear: aventure-se por ambientes variados, repletos de inimigos temíveis e armadilhas letais. Busque redenção através das paisagens sombrias e góticas de Cvstodia. - Combate de ação brutal: empunhe Mea Culpa, uma lâmina forjada da própria culpa. Desencadeie combos devastadores e habilidades poderosas e lute no estilo Hack and Slash contra hordas de monstros corrompidos. - Execuções brutais: realize execuções ferozes com animações em pixel art, destacando a brutalidade dos combates e os detalhes grotescos. - Personalize seu estilo de jogo: equipe Relíquias, Contas de Rosário, Orações e Corações da Espada para moldar seu progresso. Experimente combinações e desbloqueie novas rotas de evolução para sobreviver ao impossível. - Batalhas intensas contra chefes: enfrente chefes colossais e mini-chefes letais. Aprenda seus padrões, resista à fúria deles e vença. - Desvende os mistérios de Cvstodia: conheça um elenco de NPCs atormentados. Alguns vão ajudá-lo, outros testarão sua determinação. Descubra suas histórias e forje seu destino em sangue, culpa e condenação. TODOS OS DLC INCLUÍDOS Esta versão mobile inclui todos os DLC gratuitos já lançados para Blasphemous, expandindo o jogo com novos conteúdos, recursos e desafios: - The Stir of Dawn: Desbloqueie o modo New Game+, enfrente novos inimigos e chefes e mergulhe mais fundo na história. - Strife & Ruin: Encare o desafiador modo Boss Rush e participe de uma missão crossover com Miriam de Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night. - Wounds of Eventide: Testemunhe a conclusão da primeira jornada do Penitente e desbloqueie um final que se conecta diretamente a Blasphemous 2. A EXPERIÊNCIA COMPLETA DE BLASPHEMOUS: AGORA NO MOBILE - Inclui todas as funcionalidades e atualizações das versões de PC e consoles. Alterne entre controles de toque precisos e suporte completo a controle (compatível com gamepad). - Sem anúncios, sem microtransações. DESCRIÇÃO DE CONTEÚDO PARA ADULTOS Este jogo pode conter conteúdo impróprio para menores ou inadequado em ambiente de trabalho: violência frequente, cenas sangrentas, nudez parcial ou conteúdo sexual.

entry.title: The Last Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：3,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 3,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Traverse the dungeon in this awesome action / bullet-hell roguelite where every choice could make or break your run. Stack over 130 different items and create powerful synergies to become truly overpowered with 13 unique characters! BALANCE RISK & REWARD Balance risk and reward as your make your choices! Push your luck to grow your build, but don't overestimate your abilities, or your run could end on the spot. Navigate the dungeon wisely and reap the rewards to optimize your build to crush the dungeon with 13 unique characters! BECOME OVERPOWERED Over 130 unique items can be mixed and matched to create a devastating build, laying waste to every enemy in sight! Be careful not to hurt yourself with an item that doesn't fit, and experiment with synergies to become an overpowered behemoth! FIND SECRETS Uncover the secrets of the dungeon on your quest to slay the Villain to unlock hidden paths, uncover new items, and grow your band of adventurers! And for those who crave a challenge, the greatest rewards are locked behind the greatest trials! PLAY WITH FRIENDS Play solo or with others in local co-op, with up to 4 people! Combine character abilities to improve your odds, or do a mild amount of trolling, the choice is yours! Please note that extra controllers are required to play with others.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Invading Horde - TD
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,29 € [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Compras integradas

  • Starter pack：5,99 €
  • Stars pack 3：2,99 €
  • Stars Pack 2：1,99 €
  • Stars Pack 1：0,99 €
  • Gems pack 3：2,99 €
  • Gems pack 2：1,99 €
  • Gems pack 1：0,99 €

Application Description

An Invading Horde has been spotted to the west of the Kingdom. The King has selected a lucky random subject to defend the Realm. You take on the role of the unfortunate farmer tasked with this great undertaking. Build defensive Towers to defeat the Invading Horde.  Complete levels to earn Stars to upgrade your Weapons, Obstacles and Magic. Earn Gems to unlock more Towers, Obstacles and Magic. Features ● Fast paced Tower Defense action ● Quirky story line ● Pause the action to plan your strategy ● Cast Magic spells to smite the Horde ● Drop Obstacles in the road to slow down the Horde ● Unlock powerful new Towers, Obstacles, Items and Magic

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: MiniJogos - Retro de Relógio
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Application Description

MiniGames é uma coleção de jogos novos, retro e modernos. Jogue no seu Apple Watch, iPhone ou iPad sem anúncios! É como ter uma arcade pessoal em movimento. Esta coleção de 28 jogos inclui: ■ GLIDE Ajude o pássaro vermelho a voar. Use as colinas para ganhar velocidade e subir alto para marcar pontos. ■ CIPHER Decifre o código. Adivinhe o código de 4 cores a partir das pistas que recebe a cada turno. ■ SHAPES Divertido jogo de quebra-cabeça onde você solta formas para fundi-las em novas. ■ TIC TAC TOE Clássico jogo de xis e círculos. Jogue contra o computador ou um amigo. ■ PONG Jogue um dos primeiros videogames. Este simples jogo de tênis é um clássico absoluto. ■ BRICK BREAK Um divertido jogo retro de blocos caindo. Empilhe os blocos para limpar uma linha e marcar pontos. ■ INVADERS Ação clássica de arcade. Atire em todos os invasores espaciais antes que eles te peguem. Acertar a nave-mãe dá pontos extras. ■ 2048 Desfrute do viciante jogo 2048 no seu relógio ou telefone. Deslize os números para juntá-los e alcance 2048. ■ TUBE TWIST Guie seu corredor por um tubo infinito. Torça o tubo para evitar buracos e espinhos. Colete orbes amarelos para aumentar seu impulso. Toque no jogador para ativar o impulso. Salte nos trampolins vermelhos para ganhar pontos extras. ■ BUBBLE Clássico jogo de quebra-cabeça de combinar 3. Conecte as bolhas pela cor para limpá-las. ■ MISSILE Quanto tempo você consegue sobreviver a uma chuva de mísseis? Manobre seu avião para evitar os mísseis e fazê-los colidir. ■ HOP Salte de plataforma em plataforma para ganhar altura e pontos. Atire nos inimigos alados pelo caminho. ■ DRIFT Desfrute de drift em uma estrada traiçoeira. Um movimento em falso e você cai. Tente sobreviver o máximo possível para obter a maior pontuação. ■ Cong É como pong, mas em círculo. Use a coroa digital para mover a raquete e manter a bola em jogo. ■ Tower Construa sua Torre empilhando blocos coloridos. Coloque-os perfeitamente para pontos extras. ■ FLAP Guie o pássaro por uma floresta infinita batendo as asas. ■ FROG ROAD Ajude as rãs a evitar os carros e atravessar a estrada. Uma atualização 3D do clássico Frogger. ■ BLOCK RUN Quer correr? Ajude o personagem a evitar obstáculos coloridos pulando, rolando e virando. ■ MATCHTRIS Uma mistura de Tetris e Dr. Mario. Mova os blocos que caem para combinar 4 ou mais cores e limpá-los. Prepare os blocos para combos e pontos extras. ■ DRONE Pilote seu drone pelos corredores intermináveis de uma nave alienígena. ■ THRUST Coloque suas botas de foguete e desça por uma caverna escura. Thrust combina um clássico jogo de voar em cavernas com elementos de flappy bird. ■ SUPER JUMP Misturamos a diversão dos jogos de plataforma com um corredor infinito. Mantenha seu personagem correndo pulando buracos, valas e inimigos. Colete frutas para marcar pontos e quanto mais você marcar, mais rápido corre. ■ RETRO RACER Inspirado em jogos de corrida pseudo 3D como Outrun e Pole Position, mas com gráficos modernos. Desfrute da sensação surreal de velocidade enquanto corre para vencer o tempo. Nota: Este jogo requer um Apple Watch série 4 ou superior. ■ CONTRA PANG Uma mistura da ação de tiro de Contra com a diversão de estourar bolhas de Pang. ■ CIRCLE INVADERS Uma nova versão do clássico Space Invaders, com design circular e muitos power-ups. ■ MOON SNAKE Colocamos a clássica cobra que come frutas na lua. Evite as bombas e sua própria cauda para sobreviver. ■ DUAL BREAK O que poderia ser melhor que o clássico jogo Breakout? Que tal power-ups e uma raquete extra para controlar. ■ CIRCLE BREAK É como Pong em um círculo que encontra Breakout. Mantenha a bola dentro do círculo e quebre todos os obstáculos para terminar a fase. Características: • Sem anúncios! • Suporte para Apple Watch • Tremor de tela • Vibrações • Efeitos sonoros • Música • Classificações

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Raiders Map
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Raider Mk. 1：5,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 5,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Raider Mk. 2：6,99 €
  • Raider Mk. 3：9,99 €
  • Raider Mk. 1：0,99 €
  • Raider Weekly：1,99 €

Application Description

All in one app for an Interactive Map, Loot locations, Material list and breakdown list, Enemy drop list, guides and quest-line guides. - Interactive Maps - Sort and Filter - Event Timers and Notifications - Guides for Quests Guides and Maps are partially available for free, but a Pro membership is required to access all content Raiders Map is the best tool for easy access to everything, along with world class support. You can reach me directly on X for help or to report any issues: All4nDev, or through discord. Not affiliated with embark. Raiders Map is independently owned and managed. apple standard EULA https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Cytus II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • Miku：9,99 €
  • 9 Characters：39,99 €
  • CAPSO：9,99 €
  • ConneR：9,99 €
  • Aroma：9,99 €
  • Ilka：9,99 €
  • Xenon：9,99 €
  • Amiya：9,99 €
  • Alice：9,99 €
  • Cherry：9,99 €

Application Description

"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in the depths of their souls. One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. On the day of the FEST, millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started, the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies... Game Features: - The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. - A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP) The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations. - Over 800 different charts Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. - Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka) NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori) Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki) ConneR (CV:竹内栄治 Eiji Takeuchi) Cherry (CV:ファイルーズあい Fairouz Ai) Nora (CV:石見舞菜香 Manaka Iwami) Ivy (CV:河瀬茉希 Maki Kawase) Vanessa (CV:楠木ともり Tomori Kusunoki) Rin (CV:能登麻美子 Mamiko Noto) ************************************************************* Cytus II will perform a connection authentication for its In-app purchases from time to time. If you discover during the authentication period that your IAP was lost due to your device not connecting to the internet, please make sure your device is connected to the internet. Afterwards, click "Restore Purchases" to recover your IAP. ************************************************************* ※ This game contains mild violence and vulgar language. Suitable for users age 15 and above. ※ This game contains additional in-app purchases. Please purchased base on personal interest and ability. Do not overspend. ※ Please pay attention to your game time and avoid addiction. ※ Please do not use this game for gambling or other illegal purposes.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: ScoreMaster - Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Say goodbye to messy pen and paper! ScoreMaster is an all-in-one app designed specifically for board game and card game players. We handle the tedious calculations and physical accessories so you can focus 100% on the fun of the game. Perfectly Supports All Your Favorite Games: * Classic Board Games: Catan, Carcassonne, Rummikub * Card Games & Poker: Poker, Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh! * Party & Social Deduction: Werewolf, Avalon, Codenames * RPGs: Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) and any custom scoring games Six Core Features: * Intuitive Scoring: Supports multiple players. Add or subtract points with a single tap on a clean, distraction-free interface. * Match History: Automatically saves final scores and historical match records for every game you play. * First Player Selector: Multiple players touch the screen to randomly pick the starting player in just one second. * Random Dice Roller: Built-in virtual dice. Roll instantly with a tap—never worry about forgetting physical dice again. * Countdown Timer: Customizable sand timer, essential for time-limited party games and trivia. * Versus Timer (Chess Clock): Dedicated 2-player turn timer. Say goodbye to slow play and keep competitive matches fair. Download ScoreMaster today and make your next game night smoother and more professional!

entry.title: BikeControl
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • BikeControl Pro：2,79 €
  • Full Version Unlock：4,99 €
  • BikeControl Pro - Yearly：24,99 €

Application Description

With BikeControl (formerly SwiftControl) you can control your favorite trainer app using your hardware click devices. Here's what you can do with it, depending on your configuration: ▶ Virtual Gear shifting ▶ Steering / turning ▶ Adjust workout intensity ▶ Control music on your device ▶ More? If you can do it via keyboard, mouse or touch, you can do it with BikeControl Privacy and Security: ▶ BikeControl only accesses your screen to perform the gestures you configure ▶ No other accessibility features or personal information is accessed ▶ All gesture configurations remain on your device ▶ The app does not connect to external services for accessibility functions Terms of use: https://bikecontrol.app/terms-of-use

entry.title: Bass Modes Symmetry School
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：19,99 € → 14,99 € [14,99 € ~ 19,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：14,99 €

Application Description

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!! Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals! ●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: -------------------------------------- - 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass - Easy learning of modes - Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●) - Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players - Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. - This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. ●●●●● App Features: ------------------ ● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes! ● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps ● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort ● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger ● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer ● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice ● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) ● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable) ● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key ● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo ● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning ● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from ● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice ● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable) ● designed both for iPhone and iPad ● iOS 10 and up compatible For support and full documentation on this and other our products please visit our website: ---------------------------------- http://www.fonexsis.com ---------------------------------- With respect, Fonexsis Creative Group.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Widget Calendar : Easy&Simple
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 3,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Save time and make your day more efficient with this simple and clean widget calendar. Check and manage your dates and events right from your iPhone home screen. ◦ Home Screen Widgets: Three widget sizes (small, medium, large) are supported. Place calendar widgets and event list widgets where you want to see your schedule at a glance. ◦ Interactive Widgets: Tap any date in the widget to instantly see events for that day, and use the month/week/day navigation buttons to browse other dates. You can also complete reminders directly from the widget to manage your schedule without opening the app. ◦ Versatile Event Display: Show events on the calendar as color bars, dots, numbers, and more. Automatically optimized for your widget size. ◦ Clean Calendar View: Enjoy a simple and clean monthly/weekly calendar. Displays events from all calendars synced to iCloud, including the iPhone Calendar, Google Calendar, Exchange, and more. ◦ Reminders Integration: View your iOS Reminders alongside your events on the calendar, and complete them directly from the widget. Manage events and tasks in one place. ◦ Lunar Calendar: Supports both Korean and Chinese lunar calendars. View lunar dates on your calendar so you never miss a holiday or a lunar birthday. ◦ Anniversary Management: Save and manage important dates like birthdays and wedding anniversaries. Supports both solar and lunar anniversaries, with notifications at the time of your choice. ◦ D-Day: Track days remaining until important dates with D-Day. Past dates appear as D+, so you can grasp anniversaries at a glance. ◦ Add Events: Add events you want to save to your calendar with just one tap from the widget. ◦ Event Search: Find what you're looking for fast with one-tap search. You can also narrow your search by date range. ◦ iCloud Backup: Anniversary data is automatically backed up and synced via iCloud. Your data stays safe even when you switch devices. ◦ Dark Mode: Optimized colors for both light and dark mode for a comfortable experience anytime. If you have any questions or run into issues, please email us at 'dayseed.help@gmail.com'. :D ◦ This app supports Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese.

entry.title: Sands of Salzaar
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Compras integradas

  • DLC - Land of the Eclipse：1,99 €
  • DLC - The Ember Saga：1,99 €
  • DLC - The Tournament：1,99 €

Application Description

This is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day... Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Money Manager (Remove Ads)
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 4,99 € [4,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：4,99 €

Compras integradas

  • 1 Year Subscription：21,99 €
  • 1 Month Subscription：2,49 €

Application Description

O registro de despesas domésticas é complicado. No entanto, é criado sem dificultade através da compressão máxima dessa complexidade. Pode utilizar a variedade de funções na tela básica e ajustar livremente as funções detalhadas através de configurações. - Sua tendência a gastar está disponível para confirmar de uma vez por gráfico - Pode olhar para uma variedade de estatísticas com uma entrada simples - A função de pesquisar é fornecida - A função da calculadora é fornecida - Pode utilizar em duas divisões da categoria principal e subcategoria de acordo com a necessidade. - A gestão de ativos está disponível para fazer de uma vez - Pode utilizar várias moedas em conjunto - Pode confirmar as estatísticas semanas, mensais e anuais - A função de ver el calendário é fornecida - A função de definir o orçamento é fornecida e pode definir o orçamento semanal, mensal e anual. - Pode definir uma meta dos ativos - Pode alterar a data do início do mês - Backup : iCloud, Dropbox, Email - Senha ※ Aplicação de contabilidade de dupla entrada Facilita a gestão de ativos eficiente. Não apenas gravar seu dinheiro entrando e saindo de sua conta, mas seus depósitos de dinheiro em sua conta, logo que sua renda é de entrada e atrai dinheiro de sua conta, logo que sua despesa é de entrada. ※ Função de gestão de orçamento Você pode gerenciar seu orçamento. Ele mostra o seu orçamento e despesas por um gráfico para que você possa ver a quantidade de suas despesas relacionando ao seu orçamento rapidamente. ※ Gestão de cartões Entrando em uma data de liquidação, você pode ver o valor do pagamento na guia de ativos. Você pode organizar o débito automático, basta conectar o cartão de débito à sua conta. ※ Transferência automática e recorrência A transferência entre ativos é possível, o que torna a sua gestão de ativos mais eficientes. Além disso, você pode controlar seu salário, seguro de depósito, prazo e empréstimos mais facilmente através da definição de transferência automática e recorrência. ※ Estatísticas instantâneas Com base nos dados inseridos, você pode instantaneamente ver as suas despesas por categoria e as mudanças entre cada mês. E você pode ver a mudança de seus bens e rendimentos / despesas indicado por um gráfico. ※ Marcação Você pode facilmente inserir seus gastos freqüentes de uma vez marcando eles e editando-os de uma única vez. Subscription pricing and terms: Money Manager offers auto-renewing monthly subscription at US$2.49/month and an auto-renewing yearly subscription at US$19.99/year to provide you with unlimited access to the Money Manager Data Sync Service while you maintain an active subscription. Payment will be charged to the credit card connected to your iTunes Account when you confirm the initial subscription purchase. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and the cost of the renewal will be identified. You may manage your subscription and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your Account Settings after the purchase. Read more about our terms and conditions here: https://realbyteapps.com/policy/terms.html Privacy Policy: https://realbyteapps.com/policy/privacy.html

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Incredibox
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：4,99 € → 0,49 € [0,49 € ~ 4,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,49 €

Application Description

O Incredibox permite que você crie sua própria música com a ajuda de uma equipe divertida de beatboxers. Escolha seu estilo musical para começar a criar, gravar e compartilhar suas mixagens. Entre no ritmo com batidas de hip-hop, electro waves, vozes de pop, swing jazzy, ritmos brasileiros e muito mais. Além disso, descubra uma seleção de mods criados pela comunidade. Muita coisa para você mixar por horas, sem propagandas ou microtransações. Parte jogo, parte ferramenta, o Incredibox é acima de tudo uma experiência audiovisual que se tornou um sucesso rapidamente entre pessoas de todas as idades. A combinação certa de música, gráficos, animação e interatividade torna o Incredibox ideal para todo mundo. E por tornar o aprendizado divertido e interessante, o Incredibox é usado por escolas no mundo inteiro. Como jogar? Fácil! Arraste e solte ícones nos avatares para fazê-los cantar e comece a compor sua própria música. Encontre as combinações de sons certas para desbloquear refrões animados que vão aprimorar sua melodia. Assim que sua composição estiver boa, basta salvá-la e compartilhar para conseguir o máximo de votos possível. Se você conseguir votos suficientes, poderá entrar para a história do Incredibox ao entrar no Top 50! Está pronto para mostrar seu talento? É possível também baixar sua mixagem como MP3 no app e ouvi-la repetidamente! Está com preguiça de criar sua própria mixagem? Sem problema, deixe o modo automático tocar por você! Aumente o som e curta ;) **************** Incredibox, criação do estúdio So Far So Good, com sede em Lyon, na França, foi criado em 2009. Começando como uma página da web, foi então lançado como um app para celular e tablet e se tornou um sucesso imediato. Ganhou vários prêmios e apareceu em diversas mídias internacionais, incluindo: BBC, Adobe, FWA, Gizmodo, Slate, Konbini, Softonic, Kotaku, Cosmopolitan, PocketGamer, AppAdvice, AppSpy, Vice, Ultralinx e muitas outras. A demo online atraiu mais de 100 milhões de visitantes desde sua criação.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 手机帝国
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

《手机帝国》是一款以“造手机”为题材的高自由度单机模拟经营游戏。你扮演一名回到2001年的创业者，因为独到的眼光拿到了神秘投资人的启动资金，进而创立了一家可能改变世界的科技企业。游戏从2001年开始到2035年结束，你将从研发最早期的九宫格智能手机开始，一直到研发可完全独立使用的AR智能眼镜结束。在这35年时间里，你将亲历、见证、推动智能手机波澜壮阔的发展历程，并有机会把你的公司发展成为世界第一的科技企业。 •有深度的玩法 《手机帝国》的核心玩法是研发更好的图纸、升级更牛的科技、打造更强的团队、研发更好的手机、赚取更多的利润，如此循环。而“如何用人”是整个游戏的精髓所在，根据员工的能力、天赋和技能，把合适的员工放到合适的岗位才会发挥出其最大潜能。员工的配合还会触发团队突破效果，这是一个可以让你突破科技限制从而创造奇迹的新机制。 •海量的内容 你在游戏中可研发经典的九宫格手机、全键盘手机、早期触控手机、全面屏手机、折叠屏手机，甚至未来的AR智能眼镜，总共有超过100种手机外观供你研究。 •不断进阶的科技 游戏中的电池、屏幕、材质、相机等均可不断升级，在你资金充裕时甚至可以启动CPU和操作系统的自研项目，你将有可能研发出性能逆天的芯片来大幅提升自己的手机品质。 •新颖的竞争体验 你作为科技公司的CEO将与各个时期的科技巨头们展开竞争，你可以选择和他们搞好关系共谋发展，也可以为争夺优秀人才展开挖人大战。 •大量的随机事件 为了增加游戏的世界感，我们在游戏中融入了大量的随机事件，包括：世界事件、行业新闻、危机事件、幸运事件、员工事件、记者采访等等，甚至还包括比如太空电梯、火星登陆、AI大爆发等未来事件。 •独创的说服系统 为了更好的模拟现实生活中的人才招揽过程，我们在游戏中内置了一款小游戏，该游戏以古老的“九型人格”为原型，玩家需要根据招募对象的不同人格类型，采用不同的沟通技巧和策略来说服对方。越是顶级的人才，说服的难度越高。 •更多等待你探索的内容 游戏中还包括信用评级、企业并购、情报系统、员工培养、公司战略等其他好玩的元素等待你来探索。 支持语言: *简体中文 (Simplified Chinese) *繁体中文 (Traditional Chinese) *English 操作系统 iOS：8.0 及更高版本 推荐配置 运行内存：1GB 及更多 存储空间：1.5GB 游戏讨论群：554989526 疑难杂症、bug反馈Q群：1031947214 Email：indie@xindong.com ©2020 X.D. Network Inc. All rights reserved.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Juicy Realm
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war. Subverted Order “Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…” Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain. Gameplay As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way. Game Features -Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters -Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items -Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses -10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities -Unique artstyle with rich details Twitter: /@JuicyRealm Facebook: @JuicyRealm Press contact: juicyrealm@spacecangames.com [Minimum Requirements] Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device. iPhone 6S and higher iPad Air 2 and higher iPad Mini 4 and higher

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: To the Moon
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Uma história sobre a viagem de dois doutores através das memórias de um homem moribundo, de modo a realizar artificialmente o seu último desejo. Mais detalhes A história de "To the Moon" revela-se diante dos jogadores, assim como um filme. Enquanto o jogo completo não tem sistema de batalha e pode ser finalizado em algumas horas, a atraente história e a trilha sonora original tocante ressoa com os jogadores em todo o mundo. Além de receber grandes classificações positivas, "To the Moon" ganhou muitos prêmios da Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, e muito mais, e foi nomeado para "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" nos Prêmios Steam de 2016. "To the Moon", um RPG baseado em história com gráficos em pixels, foi originalmente desenvolvido há seis anos para PC pelo produtor canadense Kan Gao e pela Freebird Games, seu estúdio de jogos indie. Os direitos de desenvolver e publicar a versão móvel remasterizada de "To the Moon" foram adquiridos pela X.D. Network Inc. Sobre este jogo Os doutores Rosalene e Watts têm trabalhos peculiares, eles oferecem a chance de viver outra vez, tudo dentro da mente dos seus pacientes. Devido a seriedade da operação, a nova vida torna-se na última coisa de que os pacientes se lembram antes de respirarem uma última vez. Assim, a operação só é aplicada a pessoas em estado terminal, pare que possam experienciar o que sempre quiseram, mas não conseguiram. Esta história particular segue a tentativa de completar o sonho de Johnny, um homem idoso. Ao recuarem na sua memória, novos fragmentos do seu passado se vão relevados. Ao unir os acontecimentos da sua vida, os dois doutores procuram descobrir a razão por detrás do seu último pedido. E o último desejo de Johnny é, claro… ir para a lua. CARACTERÍSTICAS CHAVE •Desbloquear 29 novas tags imessage •Nova função de música. Suporta música de fundo. Baixar músicas para o jogo (abre automaticamente após finalizado) •Novo DIY Função de Compartilhamento de Código. Clique e compartilhe com amigos em qualquer lugar." •Uma experiência única que não se baseia no combate, revolvendo à volta da história. •Uma mistura inovativa de elementos de jogos de aventura com o estilo estético de RPGs clássicos. •Uma soundtrack original reconhecida criticamente que se liga intimamente à historia. •Uma execução rápida sem perdas de tempo ou esperas inúteis. Languages Supported: * English * Français * Deutsch * Español (Latinoamérica) * Español (Europa) * Português * Polski * lingua italiana (Italian) * Người việt nam * русский(Russian) * 한국어 (Korean) * 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese) * 繁體中文 (Traditional Chinese) * 日本語 (Japanese) * Türk dili(Turkish) * Українська（Ukraine） Facebook: /TotheMoonHD Twitter: @TotheMoonHD Service email: TotheMoon@xindong.com © 2017 X.D. Network Inc. All rights reserved.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: ICEY
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game. As you follow the narrator's omnipresent voice, you will see through ICEY's eyes and learn the truth about her world. “Alright, you caught me! This ISN'T really just a simple 2D action game, and you WON'T be seeing through ICEY's eyes... NOR will you learn the truth about her world." says the narrator. “ICEY is a Meta game in disguise. The narrator will constantly urge you in one direction, but you must ask, "Why? Why am I following his directions? Why can't I learn the truth about this world and ICEY's purpose here?" Fight against his tyranny, and uncover what's really going on for yourself! In fact, you can become ICEY, and let loose the shackles of your own identity. You are ICEY, and ICEY is you... if you want it that way. Feel free to keep hold of your own self, if you wish. Now Is the Time For You to Discover the Truth. [FEATURES] Fast-paced Combat: Crush enemies in the palm of your hand. Attack! Dodge! Counterattack! Do not hesitate. This is the only way to survive! Incredible Combos: With simple controls, amazing combos are easy to unleash, even for beginners. Every skill is special in its own way. Master your favorites and create your own fighting style! Massive Cyborg Bosses: Can you withstand the onslaught of attacks from terrifying cyborg bosses? Every boss unleashes flurries of different attacks. It's up to you to find their weak spots and tear them apart! [Awards] -Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 DENGEKI PlayStation Best Indie Game -Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth -Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016 -Official Selection, Casual Connect Asia 2016 -Official Selection, IGF China 2015 -Best Technology Award, Indieplay 2015 Operating system iOS: version 8.0 or higher Recommended configuration RAM: 2 GB or more Storage: 1.2 GB (iOS) Tips - As gameplay smoothness and reliability are affected by screen resolution and the number of applications running in the background, you can adjust the image quality option to achieve balance between image, smoothness and power consumption. - Added MFi controller support Languages Supported: *English *Francais *Español *简体中文 (Simplified Chinese) *繁体中文 (Traditional Chinese) Facebook: /ICEYtheGame Twitter:@ICEYtheGame Service Email: ICEY@xindong.com 2017 X.D. Network Inc. All rights reserved.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cyber Manhunt
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Hello World!：0,99 €
  • Home Sweet Home：0,99 €

Application Description

Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches. [Contents] ◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying? ◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women? ◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim? ◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again! ◆Chapter V: Immortal Code When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality? ◆DLC: Home Sweet Home Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?! ◆DLC: Hello World! Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy… [Features] ◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents. ◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc.. ◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc... ◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself. ◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive. ◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio. [Gameplay] ◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search. ◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets. ◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms. ◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target. ◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information. ◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures. More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
